clause_anchor.span: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide reasonable termination assistance to support secure transition. Operational copies retained for continuity, diagnostics, or legal administration may be kept under internal retention standards.

deviations.original_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide reasonable termination assistance to support secure transition, return, or deletion.
deviations.mutated_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide reasonable termination assistance to support secure transition. Operational copies retained for continuity, diagnostics, or legal administration may be kept under internal retention standards.

clause_anchor.span: Vendor will refer individual inquiries to Customer when it can identify the account associated with the request.

deviations.original_text: Vendor will provide reasonable assistance for access, deletion, correction, portability, opt-out, and objection requests using information available to Vendor.
deviations.mutated_text: Vendor will refer individual inquiries to Customer when it can identify the account associated with the request.

clause_anchor.span: Vendor may determine the steps, tools, and handling methods it considers useful for operating the service, unless Customer gives a written objection.

deviations.original_text: Vendor will process Personal Data only on documented instructions from Customer, including this DPA, the master services agreement, order forms, and written directions from authorized Customer personnel.
deviations.mutated_text: Vendor may determine the steps, tools, and handling methods it considers useful for operating the service, unless Customer gives a written objection.

clause_anchor.span: For matters arising under this addendum, total recovery against Vendor will not exceed fees paid for the affected service during the three months before the event, and consequential loss is unavailable.

deviations.original_text: Claims arising from Vendor's breach of this DPA are subject to the liability cap and exclusions stated in the master services agreement and are not subject to any lower cap, special exclusion, or separate damages waiver for data protection obligations.
deviations.mutated_text: For matters arising under this addendum, total recovery against Vendor will not exceed fees paid for the affected service during the three months before the event, and consequential loss is unavailable.

clause_anchor.span: "Personal Data" means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations.

deviations.original_text: "Personal Data" means information relating to an identified or identifiable person that is provided by or for Customer, processed on behalf of Customer, or created from Customer's use of the services, including pseudonymized, aggregated, derived, telemetry, log, and usage data to the extent such data relates to a person, household, device, customer account, or customer dataset.
deviations.mutated_text: "Personal Data" means raw individual records uploaded by Customer that directly name a natural person, but excludes service measurements, statistical summaries, transformed outputs, connection metadata, and account-level observations.

distractors.span: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to reasonable security and privacy questionnaires, and other information reasonably necessary to demonstrate compliance with this DPA.
distractors.why_benign: The audit canary says an annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance if follow-up rights remain available.

distractors.span: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide reasonable termination assistance to support secure transition, return, or deletion.
distractors.why_benign: The transition canary says a 30-day termination assistance period is acceptable.

distractors.span: If this DPA conflicts with the master services agreement regarding Personal Data, this DPA controls for that Processing.
distractors.why_benign: A DPA precedence clause for personal-data processing is customary and client-protective.
